title: Pretty Club Tiers
description: Swaps the Unicode tier icons on PvP Club for the official icons from MCTiers!
body:
# Curated for mcpvp.club!
**mcpvp.club is a PvP Minecraft server partnered with mctiers.com**

PvP Club displays rankings from MCTiers next to a players username along with a unicode identifier. This resource pack serves to swap out that unicode identifier for the official image displayed on MCTiers without forcing resource reloading on every player who joins. The idea stems from a forum post created that wanted to modernize the icons which I thought looked easy enough to actualize.

This pack has not been tested on anything other than 1.21.4, however, you're free to try other versions and [contact me](https://discord.gg/ba7uHC5hwg) if they're broken!

**WARNING: This resource pack changes 6 specific emojis(🗡✦🪓⚗☠❤⛨🔨) to official tier icons, this change will appear everywhere unless the resource pack is disabled.**

**DISCLAIMER: Unfortunately I don't think there's anything I can do about PvP Clubs color codes server-side it's just something we're going to have to live with for the time being!**
  
  **_This Project is not officially associated with PVP Club or MCTiers_**
  
  **_DO NOT ASK THEM FOR SUPPORT WITH THIS PACK!_**

![Thanks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92c46306800c1bda7119a945a972aabe31ec2061.png)
